channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran supreme leader accuses Trump of violating deal, vows forceful response
item.description: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei issued a statement accusing President Trump of violating the U.S.-Iran agreement and threatening a strong response.

item.title: AI race splits as China wages open-weight insurgency
item.description: China's latest AI breakthrough challenges Silicon Valley's dominance, suggesting top-tier models may no longer be exclusive.

item.title: Two U.S. troops killed in Iranian missile attack on Jordan
item.description: Two U.S. service members died and others were wounded in an Iranian ballistic missile strike on a Jordan airbase, officials said.

item.title: The bench's AI balancing act
item.description: Judges are setting AI guidelines for courtrooms and reprimanding those who fail to verify their AI-generated submissions.
